Patch Set 4: Code-Review+1

I see this source is copied from repository "integration/csit", directory "plans/usecases-pnf-sw-upgrade/pnf-sw-upgrade/sorch/simulator". It would be nice to add it to the commit message and issue description.

Is there a plan to remove it from its origin repo and migrate components using this simulator? This way there would be less code to maintain in future

Patch Set 4:

> Patch Set 4: Code-Review+1
> 
> I see this source is copied from repository "integration/csit", directory "plans/usecases-pnf-sw-upgrade/pnf-sw-upgrade/sorch/simulator". It would be nice to add it to the commit message and issue description.
> 
> Is there a plan to remove it from its origin repo and migrate components using this simulator? This way there would be less code to maintain in future

Hi Pawel, Yes indeed its been pulled out from integration/csit so that community can use it, and the commit message goes like wise, Yes, the plan is to remove code redundnacy not only from  plans/usecases-pnf-sw-upgrade/pnf-sw-upgrade/sorch/simulator, but also from /plans/so/integration-etsi-testing/so-simulators/aai-simulator.

Patch Set 4:

> Patch Set 4:
> 
> > Patch Set 4: Code-Review+1
> > 
> > I see this source is copied from repository "integration/csit", directory "plans/usecases-pnf-sw-upgrade/pnf-sw-upgrade/sorch/simulator". It would be nice to add it to the commit message and issue description.
> > 
> > Is there a plan to remove it from its origin repo and migrate components using this simulator? This way there would be less code to maintain in future
> 
> Hi Pawel, Yes indeed its been pulled out from integration/csit so that community can use it, and the commit message goes like wise, Yes, the plan is to remove code redundnacy not only from  plans/usecases-pnf-sw-upgrade/pnf-sw-upgrade/sorch/simulator, but also from /plans/so/integration-etsi-testing/so-simulators/aai-simulator.

Great, thanks! I wasn't aware that there are more c&p instances of this simulator in "integration/csit".
Change has been successfully rebased and submitted as 836bd90e99887e4d92edb0528dc69a693a13512b by Morgan Richomme

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/integration-master-aai-simulator-docker-merge/1/ : FAILURE

Unable to build due to a non-resolvable parent POM. Search logs for "[FATAL] Non-resolvable parent POM" to find the logs.

The fix for this is usually to make sure your poms are pointing to parents that exist. Double check:

 * groupId is correct and no typos
 * artifactId is correct and no typos
 * version is correct for branch ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/integration-master-aai-simulator-docker-merge/1/ )
